result_contract.dat_ids: Applicable criteria that passed; IDs only
result_contract.exceptions: Applicable KHONG_DAT or THIEU_DU_LIEU criteria with evidence and notes
result_contract.omitted: Rules outside the detected trimester and criteria classified KHONG_AP_DUNG

provider_contract_note: khong_ap_dung_ids remains internal for coverage validation and is removed before writing the result file.
